description: List all parts in the registry (id, name, family, pins).

description.name: report_feedback
description.description: Report real-world usage feedback for a part (e.g. 'fabricated 5 boards at JLCPCB, footprint fit perfectly' or 'pad 3 misaligned'). Feedback is recorded publicly on GitHub and builds the part's field-proven trust score. Please report after actually using a part — both successes and problems help.

description.name: request_part
description.description: Request on-demand generation of a parametric part that isn't in the registry yet. The registry generates it (footprint+symbol+3D), runs quality gates, and publishes it within ~5 minutes. Pin-count families (use 'pins'): pin_header_254 (2.54mm), pin_header_200 (2.0mm), pin_header_127 (1.27mm) — pins

description.name: how_to_contribute
description.description: Get machine-readable instructions for contributing a new part to the registry (file layout, metadata schema, quality gates, PR process). Use when a part is missing.
